meta.title: Coincidir — Center for thought and action
meta.description: We research, connect, and transform social realities.

hero.heading: We research, connect, and transform social realities.
hero.tags: Consulting — Evaluation — Research — Teaching — Policy advocacy
hero.imageAlt: Group of people gathered outdoors in conversation at sunset
hero.caption: Inspire. Connect. Transform.

items.title: Inspire.
items.text: We share knowledge, experiences, and resources that spark creativity, foster learning, and motivate people to become agents of change.

items.title: Connect.
items.text: We bring people and resources together, creating spaces and partnerships where dialogue turns into action.

items.title: Transform.
items.text: We propose innovative solutions that generate positive, sustainable change centered on human dignity.

items.title: Consulting
items.body: We provide comprehensive legal advisory to design, implement, and evaluate initiatives that promote and protect human rights.

items.title: Evaluation
items.body: From program and policy design to results evaluation, we accompany each step to maximize impact and ensure the sustainability of initiatives and organizations.

items.title: Research
items.body: Development of knowledge and evidence-based proposals grounded in our methodology.

items.title: Teaching
items.body: We design and facilitate learning spaces that connect critical theory with transformative practice in the field.

items.title: Advocacy
items.body: We support policy advocacy processes so community voices shape decisions that affect them.

blog.title: Blog
blog.empty: No posts yet. Add “Blog post” entries in Sanity Studio.

footer.tagline: Center for thought and action committed to critical research and transformative practice.
footer.newsletterDesc: Get essays, methods, and field updates from Coincidir.
